Home / Services / Irrigation System Repairs

Irrigation System Repairs

Fast, durable fixes for common valley irrigation problems.

Sacramento's extreme temperature swings and reactive clay soils create unique challenges for irrigation systems. From cracked pipes caused by soil shifting in Elk Grove to sun-damaged valves in Roseville's newer neighborhoods, we've seen and fixed every type of local system failure.

Our repair service begins with comprehensive diagnostics to identify not just the immediate issue but underlying causes. We check for common Sacramento problems like mineral buildup from hard water, gopher damage in Folsom's open spaces, or controller malfunctions during power fluctuations. Repairs use premium parts designed to withstand our climate's demands.

For emergency leaks that could damage your foundation or waste precious water, we offer same-day service throughout our coverage area. We also provide detailed repair reports to help you anticipate future maintenance needs specific to your system and property conditions.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Complete system evaluation and problem diagnosis
  2. 02 Step 2: Explanation of repair options and recommendations
  3. 03 Step 3: High-quality repair with durable components
  4. 04 Step 4: System testing and performance verification

Benefits

  • Fast response to prevent water waste
  • Long-lasting repairs using valley-tested parts
  • Diagnosis of underlying issues
  • Transparent pricing with no hidden fees

Frequently Asked Questions

How do I know if my system needs repairs?

Common signs include uneven watering patterns, unusually high water bills, pooling water in certain areas (especially concerning with clay soils), or reduced pressure. Many Sacramento homeowners schedule annual check-ups before summer peak season.

Can you repair older systems?

Absolutely. We specialize in maintaining and upgrading Sacramento's diverse irrigation systems, from historic Land Park homes to new Natomas developments. When possible, we preserve functional older components while replacing only what's necessary.

Do you offer warranties on repairs?

All our repairs come with a 1-year warranty on parts and labor. Many components have longer manufacturer warranties that we'll help you register.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with irrigation system repairs? Contact us today.
